original: Emboldened by the success of its Slut-Seal Thong, TamaniCorp took their patented orifice-sealing technology behind closed doors for months in order to produce a successor. The result a whole new way of storing up liquid butt-love: Backdoor Boi Slutwear. On the surface, it might appear like a boner-hugging thong for men, but inside its cock-wrapping fabric lies an array of proprietary microscopic machinery, just waiting to convert stray cum into a perfect, butthole-girding seal. With a pair of these on, you won’t lose more than single drop worth of liquid-love, no matter how packed your asshole. “Backdoor Boi Slut” is written across the back in glittery white cursive. The strip of fabric for covering up the asshole is stamped with a red target. A warning on the tag states, “Seal not guaranteed for fluid quantities over 250L.”
